description: Upfront chauffeur quotes from the terminal — transfer and hourly, with a local price history no other tool has.

novel_features.name: Fare watch
novel_features.description: Track a saved route's price over time and flag drops.

novel_features.name: Cheapest-window compare
novel_features.description: Quote one route across many departure times to find the cheapest.

novel_features.name: Multi-leg trip total
novel_features.description: Quote a sequence of legs and total the fares.

novel_features.name: Class fit advisor
novel_features.description: Recommend the cheapest vehicle class that fits the party.

novel_features.name: Quote ledger + search
novel_features.description: Every quote saved to SQLite, full-text searchable and SQL-queryable.

novel_features.name: Account bookings
novel_features.description: List your upcoming and past Blacklane rides (requires auth login).

novel_features.name: Account profile
novel_features.description: Show your Blacklane profile (requires auth login).

novel_features.name: Wallet
novel_features.description: Show wallet credits and vouchers (requires auth login).

novel_features.name: Booking handoff
novel_features.description: Quote and assemble a booking, then open browser checkout for payment under --confirm. Never charges.
